title: remove unused functions and variables
body: Lot of functions and variables were unused, so this commit removes all those functions.

comments.body: If there are things that I should be taking care of please suggest! Also being new to this project, this is my first PR.

- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
